REIS IA COMPONENTES DESIGN SYSTEM v1.0

Componentes

Every component in the Reis IA design system, organized by category. Each page includes live interactive demos, complete specifications, code snippets with copy-to-clipboard, and usage rules.

33
Total de Componentes
5
Categorias
30+
Estados Interativos
100%
Baseado em Tokens
[00] Índice de Componentes
[01] 5 variants

Buttons

Primary, secondary, ghost, hero, and link variants. All states, sizes, and CTA routing rules.

Ver documentação →
[02] 6 variants

Cards

Standard, accented, glass, featured (Sapphire Scanner), KPI, and content cards. Grid layouts.

Ver documentação →
[03] 6 states

Forms

Text inputs, textareas, selects, labels, validation states, and glass-morphism inputs.

Ver documentação →
[04] 9 patterns

Sections

Container system, section wrappers, surface alternation, ambient pools, watermarks, hero and CTA patterns.

Ver documentação →
[05] 8 components

Advanced

FAQ accordion, testimonials, stat blocks, badges, tabs, highlight banners, logo marquee, and navigation.

Ver documentação →
[01] Resumo de Componentes
Category Components Count
Buttons Primary, Hero, Secondary, Ghost, Link 5
Cards Standard, Accented, Glass, Featured, KPI, Content 6
Forms Text Input, Textarea, Select, Labels, Validation 5
Sections Container, Section Wrapper, Hero, CTA, Transitions 9
Advanced Accordion, Testimonial, Stats, Badge, Tabs, Marquee, Banner 8
Total 33
